message:
fix(cancel): close reason/cancelled visibility race in SymbolCancelToken

Acquire the reason write-lock before the compare_exchange so that the
cancellation reason is always visible to any observer that sees
cancelled=true. The winner writes the reason while holding the lock,
then explicitly drops it before notifying listeners to prevent
reentrancy deadlocks. The loser's else branch now reliably sees
Some(reason) thanks to the lock ordering guarantee.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
